cost_tokens.description: Total tokens consumed; harness-sourced from API response metadata, not self-reported by the model

role.description: Role slug of the persona at time of run (e.g. developer, platform-architect)

action.description: Verb describing what the persona did (e.g. bus:comment, bus:park, bus:quarantine)

record_type.description: Category of record (e.g. bus for bus-write operations)

artifact_url.description: URL of the artifact produced or acted upon (e.g. GitHub issue URL)

parent_id.description: ID of the parent run record that triggered this one

issue_number.description: GitHub issue number associated with this run, when applicable
